characters.description: The hidden power behind Ashfallen, Ashlock is a ninth-stage Star Core demonic tree with spatial and amethyst soul affinities. His newly enhanced roots promise extraordinary reach, but his route to Nascent Soul still demands many sacrifices and five elemental Star Cores.
characters.name: Ashlock

characters.description: Ashlock's spider summon and Ashen King, Larry has gathered enough power to request an S-grade evolution.
characters.name: Larry

characters.description: Ashlock's adopted daughter and a gifted Star Core cultivator who publicly represents Ashfallen. She is recovering from serious injuries as Ashlock strengthens the sect for the conflicts ahead, but remains central to its field operations.
characters.name: Stella

characters.description: A close companion and fellow fighter to Stella, Diana carries a demonic bloodline and travels with the markedly larger Kaida.
characters.name: Diana

characters.description: An Ashfallen researcher and Soul Fire cultivator who tends Stella's wounds.
characters.name: Elaine

characters.description: An earthworker and Mudcloak leader directing the rescue and resettlement of survivors. At the ninth stage of Soul Fire, he combines practical construction skills with responsibility for communities displaced by the recent campaign.
characters.name: Douglas

characters.description: A markedly larger companion traveling with Diana.
characters.name: Kaida

characters.description: The leader of the Redclaw family and a seventh-stage Star Core cultivator.
characters.name: Redclaw Grand Elder

characters.description: A Redclaw elder whose cultivation has advanced into the second stage of Star Core, adding to the family's growing strength.
characters.name: Elder Margret

characters.description: A Redclaw elder and smith whose cultivation has advanced into the second stage of Star Core.
characters.name: Elder Mo

characters.description: A weakened shadow tree assigned to guard Ashfallen City. She is recovering pieces of memory and emotion, and her attempt to aid a nearby family through a separate shadow avatar is mistaken for an attack.
characters.name: Shadow Tree

characters.description: A former Lunarshade merchant and Jade Sentinel now living as a weakened shadow tree in Ashfallen City. She is trying to protect a nearby family and recover fragments of memory and emotion, but her first attempt to communicate is mistaken for an attack.
characters.name: Knox

characters.description: A young girl living with her family near Ashfallen City's guardian tree. She shows an unusual sensitivity to ki, making her a possible cultivator even as the tree's clumsy attempt to help her family causes alarm.
characters.name: Jasmine

characters.description: Jasmine's father, who exhausted his ki while protecting his family and was aided by Knox's shadow. Ashfallen appoints him to organize logistics for the mortal branch of its trading company, making him a bridge to the city's residents.
characters.name: Julian

characters.description: A member of the family living with Julian and Jasmine. She and Jasmine decide to join Ashfallen.
characters.name: Catherine

characters.description: Ryker's Star Core guardian and a Silverspire representative who requests a meeting with Stella.
characters.name: Sebastian Silverspire

characters.description: A Silverspire figure who requests a meeting with Stella alongside Sebastian.
characters.name: Ryker

characters.description: The Blood Lotus power whom the Silverspires are preparing to resist. Repeated deaths among newly advanced Nascent Soul cultivators have fueled suspicion, and Ashfallen publicly accepts his removal as a shared objective.
characters.name: Vincent Nightrose

characters.description: A mortal boy whom Stella previously encouraged to reach Red Vine Peak. She supplies him with cultivation aid and a basic breathing technique, then invites him to train for Ashfallen's coming tournament.
characters.name: Sam

characters.description: An Ent defender assigned to guard the mist-grove monster trap.
characters.name: Titus

characters.description: A lightning Ent assigned to guard the mist-grove monster trap.
characters.name: Zeus

characters.description: A void Ent assigned to guard the mist-grove monster trap.
characters.name: Chaos

characters.description: An Iron Seeker who explains pavilion rules to Stella and Diana after Stella registers. He offers them a share of a large bounty if they help hunt a Star Core Lunarshade target, presenting himself as a useful local contact.
characters.name: Seth

characters.description: The concealed identity Diana uses for her promotion duel at the Eternal Pursuit Pavilion. Raven enters the arena against a Mistrout Crimson Tracker while keeping her demonic nature hidden.
characters.name: Raven

characters.description: An Iron Seeker attempting promotion after three earlier losses. The summoned Old One removes his limbs in the arena, forcing him to concede to the Mistroud Crimson Tracker.
characters.name: Ivor Frostvale

characters.description: A tentacled entity summoned by a Mistroud Crimson Tracker in the promotion arena. The Old One defeats Ivor Frostvale by removing his limbs, then recognizes Diana when she enters the next duel.
characters.name: Old One

characters.description: The green-eyed World Walker previously summoned in Diana's promotion duel. Stella names him Pluto after Maple confirms that this reckless entity is his younger sibling and warns that young World Walkers are dangerously impulsive.
characters.name: Pluto

characters.description: A World Walker allied with Ashlock whose reputation restrains the entity summoned against Diana. That entity identifies Maple as an older sibling whose reaction it has reason to fear, making his distant influence enough to prevent a lethal outcome.
characters.name: Maple

characters.description: A member of the Duskwalker family whose sister may provide Ashfallen with a contact in Nightshade City.
characters.name: Nox Duskwalker

characters.description: Nox's sister and the acting head of the vulnerable Duskwalker household. With her mother and guards missing, she confronts Stella's intrusion before Ashfallen presents a binding proxy arrangement intended to shield the family from Lunarshade pressure.
characters.name: Evelyn Duskwalker

characters.description: The Grand Elder of the allied Frostvale family, present at the Duskwalker residence when Ashfallen demands a proxy arrangement.
characters.name: Grand Elder Frostvale

characters.description: The Grand Elder of the allied Blightbane family, present at the Duskwalker residence when Ashfallen demands a proxy arrangement.
characters.name: Grand Elder Blightbane

characters.description: The Grand Elder of the allied Mistroud family, present at the Duskwalker residence when Ashfallen demands a proxy arrangement.
characters.name: Grand Elder Mistroud

characters.description: Evelyn's cousin and a trusted Lotus informant who evaluates Ashfallen's pills in the Eternal Pursuit Pavilion's restricted area.
characters.name: Mark

characters.description: A Mistrout Mystic Key cultivator who mistakes Larry for a creation under Diana's control. Impressed by the promotion duel and what she believes Diana commands, she asks Diana to accept her as a disciple.
characters.name: Elysia

characters.description: A Soul Fire cultivator proposed as a deterrent against Ashfallen City's rogue gangs. Douglas is assigned to recruit him, but the appointment depends on Mr. Choi accepting a heavenly loyalty contract.
characters.name: Mr. Choi

characters.description: The Lunarshade bounty target revealed to have approached Stella and Diana under the name Seth. His deception turns their planned hunt into an ambush and draws Ashlock into open conflict with his family.
characters.name: Albus Lunarshade

characters.description: A healing-light Ent serving Ashlock. Sol enters the gambling-house battle with the other defenders and helps restore and free Stella after her new technique leaves her wounded, drained, and immobilized among Lunarshade guards.
characters.name: Sol

characters.description: The Grand Elder of the Lunarshade family and Albus's father.
characters.name: Lunarshade Grand Elder

characters.description: Ashlock's spatial-affinity progeny and the operator of a Skyborne Bastion. Willow supplies the spatial shield that pins the Lunarshade Grand Elder and creates an opening for Ashlock's counterattack against an enemy otherwise able to move through moonlight.
characters.name: Willow

characters.description: A fifth-stage Star Core mobile fortress city built by the Mudcloaks, with a shield, cannon, command room, and dedicated crew. Douglas takes command through its control ring and leads it toward the war.
characters.name: Geb

characters.description: The Redclaw Grand Elder resumes the name Magnus and his former war title as he leads his family into battle for Ashfallen. His hellfire gives the allied force an experienced answer to incoming bounty hunters.
characters.name: Magnus

characters.description: A Redclaw prodigy whom Jasmine is challenged to defeat after reaching the Star Core Realm.
characters.name: Amber

characters.description: The Lunarshade Grand Elder and a Nascent Soul moonlight cultivator known as Phantom Moon's Heir. His teleportation and command of the lunar plane have made him the overwhelming center of the war against Ashfallen.
characters.name: Dorian Lunarshade

characters.description: An ally who helped inscribe many techniques onto Kaida's scales before Kaida entered the battle against the Lunarshade forces.
characters.name: Quill

characters.description: The Celestial Warden overseeing Nightshade City. When he learns of Dorian's death, he directs the Eternal Pursuit Pavilion to regard Ashfallen as a possible divine-level power and to seek contact through Stella.
characters.name: Tiberius
